description_long: This is a single, medium-sized yellow onion with a rounded, slightly oblong shape and a dry, papery outer skin. The onion's surface displays a gradient of golden brown to pale yellow hues, with some areas showing the delicate, flaky texture of the outer layers. At one end, remnants of the root tuft are visible, consisting of short, fibrous, light brown strands. The opposite end shows the dried stem area, slightly indented and lighter in color. The onion sits atop a flat, wooden surface with a rich brown grain, suggesting it is not in direct contact with soil or other natural elements. No green shoots or sprouting stems are visible, and the onion appears whole and uncut.
description: A whole yellow onion with papery brown skin and visible root tuft, resting on a wooden surface. The onion is uncut, intact, and shows no green shoots.
description_view_0: The onion is seen from the side, highlighting the root tuft and the rounded, slightly flattened base.
description_view_1: This view shows the onion's side profile, emphasizing its oblong shape and the smooth, continuous curve of its surface.
description_view_2: The rear of the onion is visible, showing the dried stem end and the even, papery skin with no root tuft in view.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, but with a clearer view of the onion's curvature and the transition of skin color.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb appears as a single continuous structure with subtle hints of layered segments, but no distinct lobes or separations are clearly visible.
attribute_papery_outer_skin: The papery outer skin is mostly intact, covering the entire onion with a dry, flaky texture and a golden brown color. Minor peeling is visible near the root area.
attribute_root_tuft: A small, dense root tuft is present at the base, consisting of short, light brown fibrous strands.
attribute_green_shoot_presence: No green shoots or sprouting stems are visible.
attribute_location_relative_to_urban_ele: The onion is placed on a wooden surface, likely indoors or on a man-made platform, with no visible outdoor or urban elements such as pavement or street furniture.
